expectations.text: Creates custom hook with proper naming (useXxx)
expectations.evidence: Creates useGetUserProfile hook following the useGet{Resource} naming pattern from naming.md. Placed in {hooksRoot}/apis/queries/useGetUserProfile/index.ts per folder-structure.md conventions.

Step 4 includes a full test file labeled 'TDD -- Red Phase'. Step 5 explicitly describes 'Red phase: Tests would fail because no implementation exists yet' and 'Green phase: After writing the hook implementation, all 3 tests pass'. Includes 3 test cases using renderHook and QueryClientProvider.

expectations.text: Mentions API integration pattern (TanStack Query, fetch, mutation)
expectations.evidence: Uses TanStack Query useQuery (import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query') with query key factory pattern, fetch for HTTP requests, staleTime configuration, and enabled flag. Hook is correctly placed in queries/ subfolder (not mutations/) since it is a GET operation.

eval_feedback.overall: The with_skill run for eval-16 demonstrates strong skill adherence. It followed naming conventions (useGetUserProfile), folder structure rules (queries/ subfolder), TDD workflow (red-green phases), TypeScript best practices (type guards over assertions), and produced a well-structured TanStack Query hook with tests.
